allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Xml.Linq; $xml = [System.Xml.Linq.XDocument]::Load\("C:\\_pCloud\\Extensions\\appli-treso\\unpacked\\word\\document.xml"\); $ns = [System.Xml.Linq.XName]::Get\("{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main}t"\); $texts = $xml.Descendants\($ns\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Value }; $texts -join "`n" | Out-File -Encoding utf8 "C:\\_pCloud\\Extensions\\appli-treso\\extracted_text.txt"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\_pCloud\\Extensions\\appli-treso\\extracted_text.txt")
